result.stdout:
Generate mysql script from SQL Server

Usage: mssql2mysql [options]

Options:
  -c|--connection-string <CONNECTION_STRING>  SQL Server ConnectionString
  -f|--file-name <FILE_NAME>                  MySQL Script file name, default:
                                              dump.sql
  -s|--schema <SCHEMA>                        MySQL Schema
  -?|-h|--help                                Show help information.

commands.payload:
Generate mysql script from SQL Server

Usage: mssql2mysql [options]

Options:

  -f|--file-name <FILE_NAME>                  MySQL Script file name, default:
                                              dump.sql
  -s|--schema <SCHEMA>                        MySQL Schema
  -?|-h|--help                                Show help information.

staticCommands.description: Generate mysql script from SQL Server

options.description: MySQL Script file name, default: dump.sql
